tasks.label: Deploy AArch64
tasks.command: ssh -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa deva@{config:debug.targetHost} 'pkill -9 sysnet 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -9 gdbserver 2>/dev/null || true; for i in $(seq 1 20); do pgrep -x sysnet > /dev/null || break; sleep 0.1; done' && scp -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa build/aarch64/src/sysnet deva@10.130.2.70:/home/deva/

scp -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa build/aarch64/src/sysnet deva@${config:debug.targetHost}:/home/deva/sysnet.new && ssh -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa deva@${config:debug.targetHost} 'pkill -9 sysnet 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -9 gdbserver 2>/dev/null || true; mv /home/deva/sysnet.new /home/deva/sysnet'

tasks.label: Run gdbserver
tasks.command: ssh -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa deva@${config:debug.targetHost} 'pkill gdbserver || true; pkill sysnet || true; sleep 0.5; gdbserver :${config:debug.targetPort} /home/deva/sysnet > /home/deva/gdbserver.log 2>&1 &'
ssh -i ~/.ssh/boxssh_rsa deva@${config:debug.targetHost} 'pkill gdbserver || true; pkill sysnet || true; gdbserver :${config:debug.targetPort} /home/deva/sysnet > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
